CLI Commands

Return

Use these commands in your terminal or the CLI tab in the Studio.

wordloomGenerate names with default length (5)
wordloom --prefix noGenerate names starting with 'no'
wordloom --suffix utGenerate names ending with 'ut'
wordloom --contains absGenerate names containing 'abs'
wordloom --length 6 --prefix absentGenerate 6-letter names starting with 'absent'
